name: Daniel Richardson
oneLiner: I build AI systems that turn ambiguous problems into measurable impact.
bio: Senior Data Scientist and AI systems builder at Pinterest. Over the last six years I have shipped production systems that started as side projects and grew into $80M+ audience products, global insights tooling, and agentic workflows used by hundreds of sellers and analysts. I work at the seam between modeling, product strategy, and narrative so that the work lands, not just runs.
